intake.title: The Ancient Purpose of Looking Up
intake.subtitle: Why have human beings returned to this moment in the sky for thousands of years?

overrides.curatorNotes: Ancient/strata via perception + time; sky as accumulated meaning.

this inquiry also touches time — duration as lived, not merely measured.
this inquiry also touches meaning — how significance accumulates.
this inquiry also touches consciousness — the texture of awareness itself.
this inquiry also touches perception — what organizes seeing before interpretation.
asks the same living question from a different angle: How do we inhabit time.
